focus.en: Real-time TTS inference, LLM-to-speech pipeline integration, and deployment
focus.zh: 实时 TTS 推理、LLM 到语音链路集成与部署

description.en: Built and optimized a real-time GPU inference pipeline for TTS models, and was responsible for the interaction path between backend services and the LLM before LLM-generated text was converted into natural speech for end users. Also deployed the inference service in a containerized form on AWS EC2.
description.zh: 构建并优化了面向 TTS 模型的实时 GPU 推理流水线，并负责后端服务与 LLM 之间的交互链路，再将 LLM 生成的文本转换为终端用户可听的自然语音。同时将该推理服务以容器化形式部署在 AWS EC2 上。

focus.en: GPU scheduling, runtime optimization, model compression, and trustworthy AI
focus.zh: GPU 调度、运行时优化、模型压缩与可信 AI

description.en: Worked on a series of research projects in AI systems and GPU runtime optimization, including software-defined GPU scheduling, heterogeneous kernel fusion with lower memory cost, thermal- and power-aware inference control, and uncertainty-calibrated model compression. This work combined low-level systems design with open-ended research exploration and long-term toolkit thinking for future industrial and LLM-oriented applications.
description.zh: 参与了一系列 AI 系统与 GPU 运行时优化研究，包括软件定义 GPU 调度、低内存成本的异构 Kernel 融合、面向温度与功耗的推理控制，以及带不确定性校准的模型压缩。这些工作把底层系统设计、开放问题探索，以及面向未来工业级和 LLM 场景工具链的长期思考结合在一起。

focus.en: Backend API development with Java and MongoDB
focus.zh: 基于 Java 与 MongoDB 的后端 API 开发

description.en: Implemented REST APIs with Spring Boot and Maven, tested APIs with Postman, and coordinated development through Jira and pull-request workflows.
description.zh: 使用 Spring Boot 与 Maven 实现 REST API，使用 Postman 进行测试，并通过 Jira 与 Pull Request 流程协同推进开发。
